conversation_history.content:
1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE_KEYWORD
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.LBRACE
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RBRACE
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.THEN
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.IndentConfig
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 23→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 28→
 29→/**
 30→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31→ */
 32→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33→    StandardRule(
 34→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36→            setOf(
 37→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39→            ),
 40→    ) {
 41→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42→
 43→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47→        )
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51→        node: ASTNode,
 52→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54→    ) {
 55→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57→                return
 58→            }
 59→
 60→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61→                if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 62→                    // Allow single line for:
 63→                    // else if (...)
 64→                    return
 65→                }
 66→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 67→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 68→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 69→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 70→                    return
 71→                }
 72→            }
 73→
 74→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 75→            if (autoCorrect) {
 76→                autocorrect(node)
 77→            }
 78→        }
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 82→        val prevLeaves =
 83→            node
 84→                .leaves(forward = false)
 85→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 86→                .toList()
 87→                .reversed()
 88→        val nextLeaves =
 89→            node
 90→                .leaves(forward = true)
 91→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
 92→                .toList()
 93→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 94→
 95→        prevLeaves
 96→            .firstOrNull()
 97→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
 98→            ?.let {
 99→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
100→            }
101→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
102→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
103→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
104→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
105→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
106→            prevLeaves
107→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
108→                .forEach(::addChild)
109→            addChild(previousChild)
110→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
111→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
112→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
113→        }
114→
115→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
116→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
117→            node
118→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
119→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
120→        }
121→    }
122→}
123→
124→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
125→

conversation_history.content: File content (36897 tokens) exceeds maximum allowed tokens (25000). Please use offset and limit parameters to read specific portions of the file, or use the GrepTool to search for specific content.

content.thinking:
**Analyzing multiline else-if handling**

I'm dissecting how the rule treats multiline else-if expressions, noting that the else-if on the same line as a closing brace lacks newlines in its preceding node, so the rule should allow it as a single-line else-if even in multiline contexts.**Refining else-if allowance in multiline expressions**

I’m clarifying that the rule should always allow else-if constructs regardless of newlines by permitting ELSE nodes whose first child is an IF node, avoiding forced braces wrapping that breaks expression formatting, especially in multiline chained conditionals.

No tests were run or included in this step.

content.text:
Summary:
- Updated `MultiLineIfElseRule` to always allow `else if` (ELSE with IF child) regardless of newline placement, preventing false-positive block insertion.

Tests: Not run (not requested).
